meta.siteTitle: RubRhythm - Verified Massage & Body Rub Directory
meta.siteDescription: The only US massage directory where every provider is ID-verified. Professional. Verified. Safe.

home.title: Find Verified Massage Providers
home.subtitle: Browse ID-verified providers across 250+ US cities. Every Blue Badge listing has been confirmed by our team, safe, professional, and real.
home.popularSubtitle: Top markets for body rub & massage services
home.safetyDescription: Providers can verify their identity through our free ID verification system to earn a blue Verified badge. Look for the badge when browsing, it means the provider has been confirmed by our team.

footer.tagline: The only US massage directory where every provider is ID-verified. Professional. Verified. Safe.
footer.trustDisclaimer: RubRhythm is a professional massage directory. All Blue Badge providers are ID-verified by our team. We do not support, condone, or facilitate prostitution, escort services, or any form of human trafficking. All users must be 18 years or older.
footer.byUsing: By using this platform, you agree to our
footer.allRightsReserved: All rights reserved. Professional. Verified. Safe.

myaccount.listingsOnNetwork: You have {count} {count, plural, one {listing} other {listings}} active on our network

myaccount.addListingSubtitle: Fill out the form below to publish your high-end service.
myaccount.editListingSubtitle: Update your listing details to attract more clients.
myaccount.photoRule1: No explicit, nude, or sexually suggestive photos
myaccount.photoRule2: No photos showing illegal activity or substances
myaccount.photoRule3: Only upload photos of yourself — no stock images
myaccount.photoRule4: Listings with inappropriate photos will be removed without refund
myaccount.verifiedInTitleError: The word "Verified" is not allowed in your title. Only staff-verified accounts receive the Verified badge.
myaccount.verifiedInTitleWarning: Using the word "Verified" in your title will result in deletion of your ad. Only staff-verified accounts receive the Verified badge.
myaccount.descriptionHint: Keep it professional and focused on the massage services you offer.
myaccount.showWritingTips: How to write a great description
myaccount.tip1: Type of massage (Swedish, Deep Tissue, Hot Stone, Sports...)
myaccount.tip2: Session duration and pricing (e.g. "60 min $80, 90 min $110")
myaccount.tip3: Your training, certifications, or years of experience
myaccount.tip4: Location type: in-home studio, mobile (you travel), or both
myaccount.tip5: Any specialty focus (neck & back tension, athletes, prenatal...)
myaccount.tipAvoid1: Any sexual or explicit language — listing will be rejected automatically
myaccount.tipAvoid2: Phone numbers or external links in the description (use the fields provided)
myaccount.tipAvoid3: Vague phrases like "anything goes" or "ask me what I offer"
myaccount.tipAvoid4: Pricing that doesn't match your actual rate fields above
myaccount.goodExampleText: "Licensed massage therapist with 8 years of experience. Specializing in Swedish and Deep Tissue. I offer mobile sessions across Orlando — I come to you. Sessions: 60 min $90 / 90 min $130. Focused on muscle recovery and stress relief."
myaccount.prohibitedContent: Prohibited content detected — your listing will be rejected
myaccount.prohibitedContentDesc: The following terms violate our Terms of Service. Remove them before submitting:

myaccount.buyCreditsSubtitle: Secure payment via Bitcoin. Credits delivered automatically after network confirmation. Credits never expire.
myaccount.bitcoinPaymentDesc: We accept BTC on-chain and Lightning Network. ~0.5% fee charged by NowPayments.
myaccount.bitcoinLightningDesc: We accept BTC on-chain and Lightning Network via NowPayments. Payments confirmed in seconds (Lightning) or minutes (on-chain).
myaccount.automaticCreditsDesc: As soon as your payment is confirmed on the network, credits are added automatically. You receive an in-app notification.
myaccount.paymentConfirmedDesc: Your Bitcoin payment has been confirmed on the network. {credits} credits have been added to your account.
myaccount.timeExpiredDesc: The BTC address has expired. Please generate a new payment to continue.
myaccount.paymentNotFound: Payment data not found. Please go back and try again.
myaccount.waitingForPayment: Waiting for payment on the Bitcoin network
myaccount.waitingDesc: This page checks automatically every 10 seconds. Do not close this tab.
myaccount.howToPayStep1: Open your Bitcoin wallet (Coinbase, Cash App, Exodus, etc.)
myaccount.howToPayStep2: Scan the QR Code or copy the address above
myaccount.howToPayStep4: Wait — your credits appear automatically after confirmation
myaccount.btcWarning: Send only Bitcoin (BTC) to this address. Other tokens or networks will result in permanent loss of funds.

myaccount.boost_availableNowDesc: A pulsing green badge appears on your listing card and profile for 6 hours, letting clients know you're ready to take appointments immediately. Great for filling last-minute openings.
myaccount.boost_bumpUpTagline: Jump back to the top of search
myaccount.boost_bumpUpDesc: Refreshes your listing timestamp so it appears at the very top of search results in your city, as if it was just posted. Stays on top until a new listing is posted in your city.
myaccount.boost_bumpBenefit2: Stays until a new listing is posted
myaccount.boost_autoBumpDesc: Set it and forget it. Your listing automatically bumps to the top of search results every day at your chosen hour. Credits are charged daily. Cancel anytime from your dashboard.
myaccount.boost_autoBumpBenefit1: Auto bumps daily at your chosen hour
myaccount.boost_highlightDesc: Your listing gets a colored border glow and a 'Highlighted' badge, making it visually pop among regular listings. Proven to increase click-through rate by up to 3x.
myaccount.boost_featureDesc: Your listing is shown in the exclusive Featured carousel at the top of your city page. Rotates with other featured providers. Open to all providers, no verification needed.
myaccount.boost_featurePremiumDesc: The ultimate promotion. Your listing gets top priority in the Featured carousel with 63% rotation weight, a premium purple banner across your card, and maximum exposure. Exclusive to verified accounts.

verification.verifiedDescription: Your Verified badge is active. Verified providers receive significantly more contact requests and access to Feature Premium.

verification.disclaimer: By submitting, you confirm that all photos are authentic and belong to you. Any false documents will result in permanent account suspension.
